title: Stack
description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the number of cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] +3.
notes: Block gained is calculated dynamically based on the current number of cards in the Discard Pile, plus the bonus value (0 base, 3 upgraded).
